title: [Epic] Migrate ontario-grid-data to dlt+dbt+DuckDB pipeline
description: Top-level epic tracking the full migration from the old CSV-commit pattern in ontario-grid-data to a proper dlt extraction + dbt transformation + DuckDB storage pipeline, deployed via GitHub Actions.

title: Observable Framework dashboard with Parquet export
description: Add Parquet export step to CI pipeline, scaffold Observable Framework site (dashboard/), and GitHub Pages deployment workflow. Site queries fct_co2_intensity and fct_grid_generation via DuckDB WASM.
close_reason: Observable Framework dashboard scaffolded with Parquet export; deploys to GitHub Pages via dashboard.yml workflow

title: Add dbt tests and dlt schema freeze
description: Add dbt column/not-null tests for all staging models and marts. Add dlt schema_evolution='freeze' to catch upstream schema changes as pipeline failures rather than silent nulls. Add dbt test step to CI.
close_reason: 23 dbt tests added, dlt schema_contract freeze applied, per-source CI isolation

title: GitHub Actions CI pipeline
description: Workflow that runs dlt sources + dbt transforms on schedule. Persists DuckDB on orphan 'data' branch (single-commit force-push, no history). Handles IESO/OEB IP blocks gracefully — sources that fail don't crash the run.
close_reason: CI workflow hardened: test job added, dbt source_exists guards, Chrome pre-installed on ubuntu-latest

title: Configure GitHub Actions for first CI run
description: First run should use --full-refresh flag and optionally trigger migrate_historical.py for backfill. Verify orphan data branch restore/save logic. Confirm IESO and OEB sources work from GitHub Actions IPs (not blocked like datacenter).
close_reason: CI workflow hardened: test job added, dbt source_exists guards, Chrome pre-installed on ubuntu-latest

title: Pre-2019 IESO backfill via GOC Excel files
description: Extend ieso_generation dlt resource to fetch GOC annual Excel files (2010-2018) and the special GOC-2019-Jan-April.ashx file. Requires plant→fuel mapping from daily IESO XML. _infer_fuel_from_name fallback for retired generators. Currently blocked by datacenter IP; works from GitHub Actions.

title: Add dbt staging models and mart tables
description: dbt-duckdb staging views for each source (stg_ieso_generation, stg_gridwatch, stg_oeb_rates) and mart table fct_co2_intensity. Transforms raw dlt output into clean analytics-ready tables.

title: Add unit test suite (35 tests)
description: Offline unit tests for all three pipeline sources using unittest.mock. Covers IESO CSV/Excel parsing, OEB HTML parsing, gridwatch timestamp/float parsing. All 35 tests passing.

title: Port gridwatch.ca scraper as dlt source
description: Selenium/Chrome headless scraper for live.gridwatch.ca. Yields hourly readings with merge+primary_key deduplication. Includes _parse_timestamp fix for double-space day format and graceful error handling.

title: Port OEB historical electricity rates as dlt source
description: BeautifulSoup HTML scraper for OEB rate tables. Long format output: (effective_date, rate_type, rate_column, value_cents_per_kwh). Graceful 403 handling for datacenter IP blocks.

title: Port IESO fuel-mix data as dlt source (2019-05+)
description: Monthly fuel-mix CSV downloads from ieso.ca. Handles HTTP errors gracefully (datacenter IP block). initial_value set to 2019-05-01 to avoid large downloads on first CI run.

title: dbt mart: hourly carbon intensity with source mix
description: Expand fct_co2_intensity mart to join gridwatch live readings with IESO fuel mix for a unified hourly view. Include per-source MW, percentages, demand, imports/exports, and CO2e intensity in one wide table.
close_reason: migrate_historical.py fixed and tested; fct_co2_intensity expanded to wide mart

title: Historical data migration script (migrate_historical.py)
description: Script to load old ontario-grid-data repo CSV exports into DuckDB via the same dlt schema. Covers gridwatch, IESO plant-level CSVs (aggregated to fuel types), and OEB rate CSVs (melted to long format). --sources flag for selective runs.
close_reason: migrate_historical.py fixed and tested; fct_co2_intensity expanded to wide mart

title: Publish data to observable/downstream consumers
description: Once data branch is populated, expose DuckDB or parquet exports for use in Observable notebooks or other downstream tools. May involve adding a dbt snapshot or export step.
close_reason: Observable Framework dashboard scaffolded with Parquet export; deploys to GitHub Pages via dashboard.yml workflow

title: Update CLAUDE.md with build/test/architecture docs
description: Fill in the empty Build & Test, Architecture Overview, and Conventions sections in CLAUDE.md so future agents have project context without needing to rediscover it.
